hero.title: OKAMI WINERY
hero.description: Crafted in the historic Okami Microzone, where tradition, terroir and excellence meet.

story.title: A Heritage Rooted in Georgia
story.description1: Okami Winery stands in one of Georgia's historic winemaking regions, where generations of passionate winemakers have cultivated vineyards with dedication, patience and deep respect for the land.
story.description2: Every vineyard, every harvest and every bottle reflects the identity of the Okami Microzone, preserving the traditions of Georgian winemaking while embracing innovation for future generations.

discover.title: Discover Okami
discover.description: Discover the beauty of Okami Winery through our vineyards, historic cellars, production spaces and the timeless atmosphere that defines our estate.

wines.title: Signature Wines
wines.description: Every bottle reflects the unique terroir of Georgia, carefully crafted to express authenticity, elegance and timeless winemaking traditions.

contact.title: Visit Okami Winery
contact.description: We would be delighted to welcome you to our winery and share the spirit of Georgian winemaking.
